title: Voxel Optimized
description: A high-performance modpack built to keep your PC from becoming a toasty toaster, delivering a sleek and seamless Minecraft experience with top-tier FPS optimization!
body:
![Voxel Optimized's Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b1d1a4ceb1209e087729efaf76a1dfbaeb72c47.png)
# Voxel Optimized
The **Performance Modpack** for a Smoother Minecraft! Say goodbye to lag spikes and hello to a **silky smooth experience**! With **enhanced FPS**, **lightning-quick chunk loading**, and carefully selected mods, **Voxel Optimized** transforms your game into a seamless adventure. Enjoy a fully optimized Minecraft with built-in, **performance tweaks**. Turn your PC from struggling spud to a gaming beast, and dive into a world where Minecraft runs at its best!
## Why Remarkably Optimized?
### Performance
**Voxel Optimized** outpaces competing game clients with cutting-edge performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and more. Each bundled mod has been meticulously chosen to ensure world safety while delivering significant **speed boosts** on any device. Whether you're on a high-end rig or a modest setup, **Voxel Optimized** guarantees **smoother gameplay** and **faster load times**, so you can focus on exploring, building, and thriving in a seamless Minecraft experience.
### Optifine Features
**Voxel Optimized** is **actively working** to bring in many of **OptiFine's features**, including **shaders**, **connected textures**, and **zoom functionality**. If your resource pack says "OptiFine required", there's a good chance it will work here too. We're committed to providing the same familiar visual enhancements while maintaining **top-tier performance**. Stay tuned as we continue to integrate even more **OptiFine features** into the pack!
### Works everywhere
**Voxel Optimized** does not include content mods, so you can use it on **any world** or **server** without compatibility issues. While the pack is compatible with any game launcher, we recommend using specific launchers that we support to ensure the best experience and performance. Feel free to play and enjoy your optimized Minecraft adventure on any launcher!
## Installing
I’ve created a complete installation guide over on my [**YouTube channel**](https://www.youtube.com/@byklozz), where I walk you through how to set it up with the Minecraft Launcher step by step. For more advanced users, you can also refer to [**Modrinth’s documentation**](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth) on handling .mrpacks to streamline your installation process
